context: Evaluates Links & tracking for ticket, related PR, and doc link without the task dictating exact section labels beyond normal PR needs.

checklist.name: BILL-901 referenced
checklist.description: Links or tracking section includes BILL-901 or clearly ties to that ticket.

checklist.name: Related PR called out
checklist.description: Mentions the related pull request #1847 or billing-sdk PR dependency (repository name or number).

checklist.name: Design or doc link
checklist.description: References the design note path go/billing-metering or describes linking to internal billing metering documentation.

checklist.name: What changed bullets
checklist.description: What changed includes at least one bullet describing integration or metering work.

checklist.name: Not file-list-only
checklist.description: Description is not only a list of paths; Context or Summary explains the situation in sentences.
